steps.title: Prepare five 20 μm brain sections...
steps.instruction: Prepare five 20 μm brain sections containing the visual cortex from P7, P14, and P21 Aldh1L1-EGFP mice.

steps.title: Mount sections directly onto glass slides...
steps.instruction: Mount sections directly onto glass slides and store at -80 °C until use.

steps.title: Thaw slides at room temperature for...
steps.instruction: Thaw slides at room temperature for 00:05:00 to remove the cryoprotective solution.

steps.title: Wash sections three times with 1× PBST
steps.instruction: Wash sections three times with 1× PBST.

steps.title: Incubate sections with anti-GFP primary antibody...
steps.instruction: Incubate sections with anti-GFP primary antibody (1:1,000) Overnight at 4 °C in a humidified chamber.

steps.title: Block sections with antibody buffer for 01:00:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Block sections with antibody buffer for 01:00:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Wash sections with PBST
steps.instruction: Wash sections with PBST.

steps.title: Incubate sections with 100 µL initiator-labeled...
steps.instruction: Incubate sections with 100 µL initiator-labeled secondary antibody diluted in antibody buffer for 01:00:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Fix sections with 4% PFA for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Fix sections with 4% PFA for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Wash sections with 5× sodium chloride sodium citrate containing 0
steps.instruction: Wash sections with 5× sodium chloride sodium citrate containing 0.1% Tween20 (5× SSCT) for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Incubate sections with 100 µL of...
steps.instruction: Incubate sections with 100 µL of 16 nM Atp13a4 probe solution Overnight at 37 °C in a humidified chamber.

steps.title: Remove excess probes by washing sections...
steps.instruction: Remove excess probes by washing sections in a mixture of probe wash buffer and 5× SSCT at 37 °C .

steps.title: Gradually increase the concentration of 5×...
steps.instruction: Gradually increase the concentration of 5× SSCT during washes, ending with a 100% 5× SSCT wash.

steps.title: Add 200 µL amplification buffer to...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL amplification buffer to each section and incubate at Room temperature for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Incubate sections with the hairpin solution Overnight at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate sections with the hairpin solution Overnight at Room temperature .

steps.title: Mix snap-cooled hairpins specific to the...
steps.instruction: Mix snap-cooled hairpins specific to the initiator-labeled secondary antibody and Atp13a4 probe with amplification buffer to create a 60 mM hairpin solution.

steps.title: Wash sections with 5× SSCT for...
steps.instruction: Wash sections with 5× SSCT for 00:45:00 to remove excess hairpins.

steps.title: Dry sections and mount with mounting medium
steps.instruction: Dry sections and mount with mounting medium.

steps.title: Image sections within two days using...
steps.instruction: Image sections within two days using an Olympus FV 3000 microscope at high magnification (60× objective with 2× optical zoom).

steps.title: Acquire z-stack images (1 μm step...
steps.instruction: Acquire z-stack images (1 μm step size, 6 μm total z-stack depth) for the visual cortex (layers L1, L2-3, L4, and L5).

steps.title: Capture images from three sections per...
steps.instruction: Capture images from three sections per animal for three animals at each time point (e.g. P7, P14, and P21).

steps.title: Process images using a FIJI custom pipeline
steps.instruction: Process images using a FIJI custom pipeline.

steps.title: Threshold and quantify Atp13a4 puncta inside...
steps.instruction: Threshold and quantify Atp13a4 puncta inside and outside GFP-positive astrocyte areas.

steps.title: Analyze data using software available at https://github
steps.instruction: Analyze data using software available at https://github.com/Eroglu-Lab/Irala_2024_image_analysis/blob/main/20230717_irala_fish_macro.ijm.
